dag_desc: Fix 7 friction points from swarm-dispatch session: sub-DAG dead-end, stale input hashes, single-DAG head.json, haiku gitsafe confusion, advance on feature branches, completed.json main-branch commit block, legacy spec migration

tasks.desc: When orient returns complete:true on a sub-DAG, scan .roadmap/head.*.json for parent/sibling DAGs and surface them in orient output as 'parentDags[]' with path, dagId, completionStatus. Currently orient only shows pendingSpecs (unloaded spec files) — it misses alternate head.json files that represent larger DAGs. Agent in donjon session hit dead-end: sub-DAG complete, no forward pointer to head.donjon-main-final.json.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: orient surfaces sibling head.*.json DAGs when current DAG is complete — agents never hit dead-end

tasks.desc: Add --rehash flag to 'roadmap make'. When set, auto-update input sha256 hashes to match current file contents instead of failing on mismatch. Every code change to bin/roadmap.ts invalidates all specs referencing it — agents can't load specs without manual hash fixup. Rehash computes sha256 of each input.path, updates the in-memory spec, then proceeds with normal validation. Also write updated hashes back to the spec file.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: make --rehash auto-fixes stale input hashes — no manual sha256 fixup needed

tasks.desc: Support multiple active DAGs. Replace single .roadmap/head.json with .roadmap/heads/<dagId>.json. orient() unions across all head files (or accepts --dag <id> filter). make writes to heads/<dagId>.json instead of overwriting head.json. Backward compat: if head.json exists and no heads/ dir, migrate on first access. This unblocks true parallel DAG execution — loading spec A then B no longer destroys A.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: multiple DAGs coexist in heads/ dir — make doesn't overwrite, orient unions or filters

tasks.desc: gitsafe main-branch gate should detect worktree context and adjust error messages. When running in a git worktree (git rev-parse --git-common-dir != .git), the 'only allowed from main' error should instead say 'you are in a worktree on branch X — this is expected, proceed with your feature branch workflow.' Also: make should be allowed from worktrees (worktrees ARE the isolation mechanism). The enforceMainBranch check should pass when isWorktree() returns true.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: gitsafe exempts worktrees from main-branch gate — make/advance work in worktrees without confusion

tasks.desc: Allow 'roadmap advance' on feat/* and wip/* branches. advance is read-only (validates + records evidence to completed.json) — it should not be gated to main. Only make and dag-mutate commands need the main-branch gate. Check if friction-fix-003 advance-on-branches node already shipped this fix; if so, verify it works in worktree context too. If not shipped, implement: exempt 'advance' from enforceMainBranch in bin/roadmap.ts.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: advance works on feat/wip branches and in worktrees — only make/dag-mutate require main

tasks.desc: Exempt .roadmap/completed.json from the main-branch pre-commit write guard. completed.json is written by 'advance' as evidence — it must be committable on main without creating a throwaway feature branch. The pre-commit hook should allow staging completed.json on main (alongside head.json which remains protected). Modify scripts/hooks/pre-commit to whitelist completed.json.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: completed.json is committable on main — only head.json remains write-protected

tasks.desc: Add 'roadmap spec migrate <path>' command. Detects missing/outdated fields in spec files and fixes them: adds empty inputs[] with role 'spec' if missing, adds metadata.compile_hash as 'auto' if missing, adds engine block with defaults if missing, adds dag_desc if missing (copies from first task desc). Reports what was fixed. Allows legacy specs like spec-rebuild.json to load without manual editing.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: spec migrate auto-fixes legacy specs — adds missing required fields with sensible defaults

tasks.desc: Integration: all 7 friction fixes work together. orient surfaces parent DAGs, make --rehash fixes hashes, multiple DAGs coexist, worktrees bypass gitsafe, advance works on feature branches, completed.json commits on main, legacy specs migrate.

validate.statement: All 7 swarm friction points resolved — agents can execute parallel DAGs in worktrees without manual intervention
